reviewedFixFeatures.summary: Removes the dead cone-tool counter instrumentation identified in round 2 and leaves the real nested-agent stdout, registry, and scratch-folder assertions as the actual VAL-NEST-015 proof.
Suppresses the generic "Agent not initialized" follow-up after a specific init-time error is already captured and adds a regression test matching the real ScoopContext.init()/prompt() callback order.

rejectedObservations.observation: The mission validation contract still describes VAL-NEST-015 in terms of cone-tool call counters staying zero, but the accepted remediation now relies on real-runtime stdout/registry/scratch assertions instead.
rejectedObservations.reason: Mission-specific validation-contract wording rather than durable repo shared state; no services.yaml, library, AGENTS.md, or skill update is needed for this rerun.
